latin: Multis annis post discessum Bilbonis, Gandalf magus ad Frodonem rediit et res graves nuntiavit. anulus quem Bilbo reliquerat non erat anulus ordinarius, sed Anulus Unus, a Saurone Obscuro olim fabricatus. hic anulus dominatum omnium anulorum potestatis tenebat. Gandalf Frodonem monuit: anulus delendus erat, aut Sauron totum mundum in servitutem redigeret. solum in ignibus Montis Fati anulus destrui poterat.

questions.prompt: What did Gandalf reveal about the ring?
questions.target: It was the One Ring, forged by Sauron
choices: It was the One Ring, forged by Sauron
It was a ring of the Dwarves

questions.prompt: What would happen if the Ring was not destroyed?
questions.target: Sauron would enslave the whole world
choices: Sauron would enslave the whole world
The Ring would lose its power

questions.prompt: Where could the Ring be destroyed?
questions.target: In the fires of Mount Doom
choices: In the fires of Mount Doom

questions.prompt: How long after Bilbo's departure did Gandalf return?

translation: Many years after Bilbo's departure, Gandalf the wizard returned to Frodo and announced grave matters. The ring that Bilbo had left behind was not an ordinary ring, but the One Ring, once forged by Sauron the Dark. This ring held dominion over all the rings of power. Gandalf warned Frodo: the ring had to be destroyed, or Sauron would reduce the whole world to slavery. Only in the fires of Mount Doom could the ring be destroyed.
